<!-- Short, memorable name (e.g. "The Reverse Interview") -->

**Category**

**The prompt**
<!-- Paste the exact prompt text -->

**Why it works**
<!-- One sentence on the mechanism — what failure mode does it fix? -->

**Usage notes**
<!-- When and how to use it. What context does it work best in? -->

**Tags** (optional)
<!-- 2-3 lowercase tags, e.g. clarity, requirements, unblocking -->
